notes.VAL-ICON-006_clarification: The visual-regression flow validator initially reported VAL-ICON-006 as failed due to duplicate SVG patterns found in ModuleList.js (video, lab, flashcards icons) and App.js (grid icon in navigation). However, these duplicates are outside the scope of the shared-icon-components feature, which explicitly targeted 12 inline SVGs across DashboardSections.js (5), GoalCard.js (5), and ModuleList.js (2 — the grid toggle only). All 12 targeted SVGs were properly replaced with shared imports. The Icons.jsx components render the exact same SVG markup as the originals, npm test passes (426/426), and no visual regression exists in the replaced components. The remaining inline SVGs in ModuleList.js and App.js are pre-existing and not part of this milestone.
